steps.t: Limael's Vineyard is located to the north-west of Celondim. You can find beeswax from the hives near the vineyard's entrance.
Gairil is working at the Celondim docks to the south. You should bring the beeswax to him.
Gairil has given you one of the lanterns he crafted earlier. You should set the lantern down onto the river.
